content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 5.1.1(i) WARN — Privacy policy states "We do not collect, process, or store your location data" while RunSessionManager.swift uses CLLocationManager to actively track and store GPS routes (RunSessionManager.swift:1-14), and the app description explicitly advertises "maps every run with GPS" (description.txt:1).
Pierre: This is a direct contradiction Apple reviewers actively look for — the privacy policy denies location collection while the app's core feature and marketing copy both confirm GPS tracking and route storage. This mismatch will likely trigger a rejection or at minimum a reviewer question during 5.1.1 review. Fix the privacy policy to accurately disclose location collection, its on-device/iCloud storage, retention, and deletion mechanism, and ensure it matches the App Privacy nutrition label in App Store Connect.
